contestName: ICPC 武汉全国邀请赛暨湖北省赛

blocks.text: You are given $n$ lowercase strings $s_1,s_2,\ldots,s_n$, sorted by non-decreasing length. For every $1\le i<j\le n$, define $t_{i,j}=s_i+s_j$.
For a string $t$ of length $m$, let $f(t)$ be the number of integers $x$ with $0<x\le m$ such that the first $x$ characters equal the last $x$ characters, namely $t[1:x]=t[m-x+1:m]$.

The first line contains $n$ ($1 \le n \le 10^6$). Each of the next $n$ lines contains a lowercase string $s_i$ ($1 \le |s_i| \le 10^6$). The strings are sorted by non-decreasing length, and $\sum_{i=1}^{n}|s_i| \le 10^6$.
Output one line containing an integer, representing the total sum of all f (ti,j ).
In the second sample, there are n = 3 strings, and we can form 3 different ti,j:

items: When i = 1, j = 2: t1,2 = aaabaa. The lengths x such that the prefix equals the suffix are: 1, 2, 6.
When i = 1, j = 3: t1,3 = aaababaa. The lengths x such that the prefix equals the suffix are: 1, 2, 8.
When i = 2, j = 3: t2,3 = abaaababaa. The lengths x such that the prefix equals the suffix are: 1, 4, 10.

blocks.text: 给定 $n$ 个小写字符串 $s_1,s_2,\ldots,s_n$，它们按长度非递减排列。对任意 $1\le i<j\le n$，定义 $t_{i,j}=s_i+s_j$。
对长度为 $m$ 的字符串 $t$，定义 $f(t)$ 为满足 $0<x\le m$ 且前 $x$ 个字符等于后 $x$ 个字符的整数 $x$ 的数量，即 $t[1:x]=t[m-x+1:m]$。
第一行包含 $n$（$1 \le n \le 10^6$）。接下来 $n$ 行中，第 $i$ 行包含一个小写字符串 $s_i$（$1 \le |s_i| \le 10^6$）。字符串按长度非递减排列，且 $\sum_{i=1}^{n}|s_i| \le 10^6$。
输出一行包含一个整数，表示所有f (ti,j)的总和。
在第二组样例中，共有n=3个字符串，我们可以组合出3种不同的ti,j：

items: 当i=1,j=2时：t1,2=aaabaa。满足前缀等于后缀的长度x有：1,2,6。
当i=1,j=3时：t1,3=aaababaa。满足前缀等于后缀的长度x有：1,2,8。
当i=2,j=3时：t2,3=abaaababaa。满足前缀等于后缀的长度x有：1,4,10。
